actionCalls.name: CF_Owner_Update_Through_OBS_Upsell_Event
actionCalls.label: CF Owner Update Through OBS Upsell Event

assignments.name: Add_Child_Acct_ID_to_VarColl_to_Get_CF
assignments.label: Add Child Acct ID to VarColl to Get CF

assignments.description: Adding all the child Account IDs to the collection to be used later to get all the related combined funnel that need to have the OBS owner updated
assignments.name: Add_ID_to_Collection_to_Get_CF
assignments.label: Add ID to Collection to Get CF

rightValue.stringValue: PILOT: OBS Single-Site: Brightwheel Setup - 45 Min

decisions.description: Check to see for the Chili Piper meeting type - Billing Sales Follow-up, if the whatid is opportunity or account.
decisions.name: Billing_SFU_Whatid_is_Opp_or_Acct
decisions.label: Billing SFU Whatid is Opp or Acct

decisions.description: When to see when the Biiling Upsell Sales follow-up call is scheduled - to update the contact and opportunity, when it's completed - update the contact Biiling Upsell Sales follow-up call is completed date.
decisions.name: Billing_Upsell_Sales_Follow_up_Scheduled_or_Completed
decisions.label: Billing Upsell Sales Follow-up Scheduled or Completed?

decisions.name: BU_Oppty_Found_when_OBS_Call_Scheduled
decisions.label: BU Oppty Found when OBS Call Scheduled?

decisions.name: Found_Child_With_Same_Parent_Acct_ID
decisions.label: Found Child With Same Parent Acct ID

decisions.description: Check if the Gov sales follow-up call was scheduled or completed
decisions.name: Gov_Scheduled_or_Completed
decisions.label: Gov Scheduled or Completed

decisions.name: Is_this_BU_Oppty_Closed_Won
decisions.label: Is this BU Oppty Closed Won ?

decisions.description: Check if account is the Multi-Site Parent or Multi-site child
decisions.name: Multi_Site_Accounts
decisions.label: Multi-Site Accounts

decisions.name: Opportunity_Found_Based_on_Acct_Cont
decisions.label: Opportunity Found Based on Acct & Cont

rules.name: Yes_Opportunity_Found_Based_on_Acct_Cont
rules.label: Yes,Opportunity Found Based on Acct & Cont

rules.name: No_Update_Gov_Contact_Sales_Followup_Completed
rules.label: No, Update Gov Contact Sales Followup Completed

rules.name: No_Update_Contact_Saas_Sales_Followup_Completed
rules.label: No, Update Contact Saas Sales Followup Completed

decisions.description: This node is to see if we want to update the scheduled date fields or the completed date fields.
decisions.name: Scheduled_or_Completed
decisions.label: Scheduled or Completed?

decisions.description: checking to see if we want to populate the AE Post-CW Check-In Scheduled Date or Completed Date
decisions.name: Scheduled_or_Completed_AE_Post_Sales_15
decisions.label: Scheduled or Completed AE Post Sales 15

decisions.description: checking to see if we need to populate the Billing Upsell AE Post-CW Scheduled Date or Completed Date
decisions.name: Scheduled_or_completed_Billing_UP_AE_Post_Sales
decisions.label: Scheduled or completed Billing UP AE Post Sales

decisions.description: Check what Chili Piper Meeting Type was Scheduled or Completed - For the Standard Onboarding Path - checking if it is "PILOT: OBS Single-Site: Brightwheel Setup - 45 Min", "PILOT: OBS Mutli-Site: Brightwheel Setup - 45 Min", or "Sales - BW Setup Followup"
decisions.name: Type_of_CP_Meeting
decisions.label: Type of CP Meeting

rules.name: Standard_OB_Path_PILOT_Meeting_Types
rules.label: Standard OB Path PILOT Meeting Types

rightValue.stringValue: Billing Upsell - Billing Setup Follow Up

rules.name: Billing_Upsell_CP_OBS_Meeting_Type

rightValue.stringValue: OBS Single Site and Eng - Brightwheel Billing Training - 30 Min
OBS Multi-Site and Eng - Brightwheel Billing Training - 30 Min

rules.label: Billing Upsell CP OBS Meeting Type

rightValue.stringValue: Sales - BW Post Sale 15 Day Followup
Billing Upsell - BW Post Sale 15 Day Followup

decisions.name: Type_of_Opportunity_Found_Acct_Cont
decisions.label: Type of Opportunity Found Acct Cont

decisions.description: Was there an open Billing Upsell Opportunity Found so we can update the Sales Follow-up Meeting Scheduled Date on the Oppty.
decisions.name: Was_an_Billing_Upsell_Opportunity_Found
decisions.label: Was an Billing Upsell Opportunity Found?

decisions.description: The goal is to find Billing Onboarding Record that is owned by Standard Onboarding Path Queue, that is not opted out ( avoid updating older Billing onboarding record).
decisions.name: Was_Billing_Onboarding_Record_Found
decisions.label: Was Billing Onboarding Record Found?

decisions.description: Check to see if we found any Combined Funnel Records
decisions.name: Was_Combined_Funnel_Found
decisions.label: Was Combined Funnel Found?

decisions.description: Checking to make sure we found a contact record
decisions.name: Was_Contact_Found
decisions.label: Was Contact Found?

decisions.description: Check to see if there is Whatid on the Event and if that Whatid is an Opportunity or Account.
decisions.name: Whatid_is_Account_or_Opportunity
decisions.label: Whatid is Account or Opportunity

Flow.description:
Record Trigger Flow for every time a chili Piper "Sales - BW Setup Followup" Meeting Type created to automatically populate the (1) Sales Follow-up Call Scheduled Date / (2) Sales Follow-up Call Completed Date on the related Contact record 04-01-25 - BW - Added population of OBS Call Scheduled Date for specific CP Meeting Types
LK - 01/3/25 - Added OBS 1:1 Meeting Schedule Path - to update the OBS Owner on the Contact, Account, Combined Funnel. LK 1/7/25 - Added Filter on the OBS Decision node, so OBS is only updated if the Contact has a Sales Follow-up Call Scheduled. For standard onboarding path - if SSP and Ratecard was added then the OBS is updated at the CW process. LK - 1/24/2025 - Update the different Gov/Billing Upsell Sales followup Fields on Contact based the open opportunity. LK - 1/31/2025 - Added Billing Upsell Meeting Type and Logic to update sales follow-up for Upsell. LK - 2/6/2025 - Update the Sales Follow-up Meeting Completed Date, - Accountid is the whatid, the opportunity is closed, then look at the assigned role. LK - 2/11/2025 - Added "Sales - BW Post Sales 15 Day Follow" CP meeting type - to update the contact's [ AE Post-CW Check-In Scheduled Date & AE Post-CW Check-In Completed Date] LK - 2/11/2025 - Added Billing BW Post Sales 15 Day Follow CP Meeting Type LK- 2/12/2025 - Updated the Decision node to include multi-site meeting which was missing to update the OBS LK- 02/18/2025 - Updated Account Logic, to determine OBS Call set for Single Site or Multi-Site. BW - 04/01/2025 - Added population of OBS Call Scheduled date based on CP Meeting Types JS - 05/27/2025 - Updated Entry Criteria to check if LOGIC Trigger Counter is updated to enable field updates if the meeting is marked as complete prior to Event End Time LK - 06/13/2025 - Fix - Update to make sure we are also updating Opportunity that isclosed and in one of the Post CW Stages for Sales Follow-up Calls ( SSPR OR OBE ) . LK - 09.18.2025 - Adding Logic for Billing Upsell OBS Branch - Get Opportunity and Combined Funnel to update the OBS owner.
Flow.interviewLabel: Event - After Save - Standard Onboarding Path {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Event - After Save - Standard Onboarding Path

loops.description: If Event was related to multi-site child Account, then we are using the parent account Id from the child to find all the child accounts to update the OBS Owner
loops.name: Loop_Thru_Related_Child_Acct
loops.label: Loop Thru Related Child Acct

recordLookups.description: get the account related to the contact that is related to the triggered Event, to get to the combined funnel.
recordLookups.name: Get_Account_for_OBS_Owner_Change
recordLookups.label: Get Account for OBS Owner Change

recordLookups.description: The Event was related to a Multi-Site Child Account, so we need to use the child's parent account id to find all other child accounts
recordLookups.name: Get_Accounts_with_the_Same_Parent_ID
recordLookups.label: Get Accounts with the Same Parent ID

recordLookups.description: Get the Billing Upsell Opportunity that is not Close Lost. Using the related id to the event. If it's related to BU opp, then go grab that exactly BU opp. If it's related to an account, then find the right BU opp with the most recently closedate.
recordLookups.name: Get_Billing_Upsell_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Billing Upsell Opportunity OBS

recordLookups.description: If Billing Upsell is Closed Won when the OBS Event was scheduled, then go grab the Combined Funnel and update the CF Ownership to the assigne id of the OBS Billing Upsell event. The OBS was selected by Chili Piper.
recordLookups.name: Get_BU_Combined_Funnel_OBSUpdate
recordLookups.label: Get BU Combined Funnel OBSUpdate

recordLookups.description: Getting all Combined Funnels for the multi-site account hierarchy to update the Owner to the OBS that was selected by Chili Piper Round Robin.
recordLookups.name: Get_Child_Combined_Funnels
recordLookups.label: Get Child Combined Funnels

recordLookups.description: Get the related Combined Funnel to the account we found. Sometimes Combined Funnel might not have been created so to prevent this flow from failing we are going check if there is a combined funnel to change the ownership to the OBS owner that Chili Piper assigned on the PILOT Standard Onboarding Path Meetings.
recordLookups.name: Get_Combined_Funnel
recordLookups.label: Get Combined Funnel

recordLookups.description: Get the Contact related to the Chili Piper Event created to update the (1) Sales Follow-up Call Scheduled Date at creation (2) Sales Follow-up Call Completed Date at completion of the event.
recordLookups.name: Get_Contact
recordLookups.label: Get Contact

recordLookups.description: Get the open billing upsell oppty related to the Event with the Whoid and Whatid ( Acct)
recordLookups.name: Get_Open_Billing_Upsell_Oppty
recordLookups.label: Get Open Billing Upsell Oppty

recordLookups.name: Get_Open_Opportunities
recordLookups.label: Get Open Opportunities
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND ((8 OR 9 OR 10) AND (2 OR (3 AND 4) OR 5 OR 6 OR 7))

recordLookups.description: Get the opportunity that is related to the Event and then check which record type that opportunity is so that we can update the correct contact field for "sales follow-up calls"
recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity

recordLookups.description: I am using the Whatid(account) and Whoid to get the correct Opportunity when the event is only related to Account and contact. This also solves for when a contact is related to multiple accounts, we want to get the right opportunity.
recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity_Based_on_Acct_Contact
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity Based on Acct & Contact

recordUpdates.description: When the "Sales bw Followup" meeting type is scheduled in CP and no account or opportunity is related, then we will just update the Sales Follow-up Scheduled Date on the Contact.
recordUpdates.name: Default_Update_Contact_on_Sales_Follow_up_Call
recordUpdates.label: Default Update Contact on Sales Follow-up Call

recordUpdates.name: Gov_Sales_Followup_Completed
recordUpdates.label: Gov Sales Followup Completed

recordUpdates.name: Update_Billing_AE_Post_CW_Completed_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Billing AE Post CW Completed Date

recordUpdates.name: Update_Billing_AE_Post_CW_Scheduled_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Billing AE Post CW Scheduled Date

recordUpdates.name: Update_Billing_Upsell_Oppty_Sales_Follow_up_Scheduled_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Billing Upsell Oppty Sales Follow up Scheduled Date

recordUpdates.description: Update the Combined Funnel owner when OBS Billing Upsell Call is Scheduled ( OBS round-robined through Chili Piper).
recordUpdates.name: Update_CF_Owner_BU_OBS
recordUpdates.label: Update CF Owner BU OBS

recordUpdates.name: Update_CF_Owner_with_OBS
recordUpdates.label: Update CF Owner with OBS

recordUpdates.description: Checks to see if the AE Post Sales Follow up completed and then update the event
recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_AE_Post_Sales_FU_Completed_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact AE Post Sales FU Completed Date

recordUpdates.description: Checks to see if the AE Post Sales Follow up scheduled date is null or if rescheduled - then update the date field
recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_AE_Post_Sales_FU_Scheduled_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact AE Post Sales FU Scheduled Date

recordUpdates.description: Update the contact's Billing Upsell Sales Follow-up Completed Date.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_Billing_Upsell_Sales_FU_Completed_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact Billing Upsell Sales FU Completed Date

recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_Billing_Upsell_Sales_FU_Scheduled_date
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact Billing Upsell Sales FU Scheduled date

recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_Gov_Sales_Followup_Fields
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact Gov Sales Followup Fields

recordUpdates.description: When a Sales Followup call is completed, only the contact is updated, not the opportunity.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_Sales_Followup_Completed_Field
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact Sales Followup Completed Field

recordUpdates.description: Update the same field on the Contact to make sure the data matches
recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_Sales_Followup_Fields
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact Sales Followup Fields

recordUpdates.name: Update_Gov_Lic_Oppty_s_Sales_Follow_up_Fields
recordUpdates.label: Update Gov Lic Oppty's Sales Follow-up Fields

recordUpdates.name: Update_Mult_Site_Combined_Funnel_Owner
recordUpdates.label: Update Mult-Site Combined Funnel Owner

recordUpdates.name: Update_OBS_Owner_on_BU_Oppty
recordUpdates.label: Update OBS Owner on BU Oppty

recordUpdates.name: Update_Open_Opp_OBS_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Open Opp - OBS Date

recordUpdates.description: Update the Opportunity that is related to the Event - Sales Follow up Scheduled Date
recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_Sales_Followup_Field
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity Sales Followup Field

recordUpdates.name: Update_owner_of_billing_onboarding
recordUpdates.label: Update owner of billing onboarding

recordUpdates.name: Update_Parent_Combined_Funnel
recordUpdates.label: Update Parent Combined Funnel

recordUpdates.name: Update_Parent_Owner_OBS
recordUpdates.label: Update Parent Owner & OBS

recordUpdates.name: Update_the_Child_s_Parent_with_OBS
recordUpdates.label: Update the Child's Parent with OBS

recordUpdates.description: Update the related Oppty's Sales Follow-up Call Scheduled Date on the Billing Upsell Oppty
recordUpdates.name: Update_the_Oppty_Billing_Sales_Followup
recordUpdates.label: Update the Oppty Billing Sales Followup

start.filterFormula: ( OR( {!$Record.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'Sales - BW Setup Followup', {!$Record.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'Billing Upsell - Billing Setup Follow Up', {!$Record.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'Sales - BW Post Sale 15 Day Followup', {!$Record.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'Billing Upsell - BW Post Sale 15 Day Followup' ) || ( OR({!$Record.LOGIC_OBS_Call__c} = true, {!$Record.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'OBS Multi-Site and Eng - Brightwheel Billing Training - 30 Min', {!$Record.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'OBS Single Site and Eng - Brightwheel Billing Training - 30 Min') && NOT( {!$Record.Meeting_Completed__c} ) ) ) && NOT( ISBLANK( {!$Record.WhoId} ) ) && ( ISCHANGED( {!$Record.LOGIC_trigger_counter__c} ) || ISBLANK( {!$Record.LOGIC_trigger_counter__c} ) || ISCHANGED( {!$Record.WhatId} ) )

textTemplates.name: BUCFOwnerChatterPost

variables.description: text collection of child account ids for multi-site, where the event is the parent account and we have to get all the child accounts.
variables.name: ChildAcct_ids

variables.description: Collection Variable to add all the combined funnels that need to have the owner updated
variables.name: VarCol_CombinedFunnelsOwner
